## Checklist

- [ ] `bun run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `bun run lint` passes
- [ ] `bun test src` passes
- [ ] `bun run build` produces a working bundle
- [ ] No new network egress beyond `127.0.0.1` / `api.github.com` / `registry.npmjs.org`
- [ ] No secrets in the repo or in `.env` (keyring only)
- [ ] No LLM SDK added (CLIs only)
- [ ] README / CHANGELOG updated if user-facing behaviour changed
